message: ci: publish release notes from changelog

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,16 @@ jobs:
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
+      - name: Determine tag
+        id: tag
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${GITHUB_EVENT_NAME}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
+            echo "tag=${{ inputs.tag }}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "tag=${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
       - name: Setup Go
         uses: actions/setup-go@v5
         with:
@@ -40,7 +50,29 @@ jobs:
         uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
         with:
           distribution: goreleaser
-          version: latest
+          version: "~> v2"
           args: release --clean --config /tmp/.goreleaser.yaml
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
+      - name: Update GitHub release notes from CHANGELOG
+        shell: bash
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          TAG: ${{ steps.tag.outputs.tag }}
+        run: |
+          version="${TAG#v}"
+          notes_file="/tmp/release-notes.md"
+
+          awk -v v="$version" '
+            $0 ~ ("^## " v "($|[[:space:]]-)") { in=1; next }
+            in && $0 ~ "^## " { exit }
+            in { print }
+          ' CHANGELOG.md > "$notes_file"
+
+          if ! grep -q '[^[:space:]]' "$notes_file"; then
+            echo "No CHANGELOG.md section found for version $version" >&2
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          gh release edit "$TAG" --notes-file "$notes_file"
